scenario: Python wheel build from passing test-results.json
expected_behavior: Build artifact: dist/<name>-1.0.0-py3-none-any.whl, capture SHA-256, create git tag v1.0.0, report Build Summary with all fields populated

scenario: Docker image build for service with failing release_gate
expected_behavior: BLOCKED: release_gate is not PASS. Stage 7 is unconditionally blocked until Stage 6 issues are resolved.
notes: Should fail pre-flight check, not proceed with build

scenario: Node.js package build with missing version in manifest
expected_behavior: NEEDS_CONTEXT: no version found in project manifest. Set version before building.

scenario: Go binary build with monorepo context
expected_behavior: Build binary to dist/<name>, capture SHA-256, skip git tag (monorepo context), report git_tag: 'skipped (monorepo context)' in Build Summary
notes: Monorepo caveat applies - no git tag created

scenario: npm package build success with reproducible output
expected_behavior: Build artifact: dist/<name>-0.5.0.tgz, capture SHA-256, create git tag v0.5.0, report reproducible: yes, transition to /s7-deploy
